title: coleus fasciculatus
intro: Coleus fasciculatus, also known as puncturevine or caltrop, is a perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Coleus fasciculatus include reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and promoting healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Coleus fasciculatus can be made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
